data.title: Colombia's data center market is booming, with upcoming capacity projected to reach over 230 MW, 4 times current levels. Bogota remains central hub with over 98% of capacity.
data.description: A comprehensive database on the "Colombia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The city of Bogota continues to serve as the primary focal point, holding more than 98% of the total rack capacity currently available and anticipated in the country. The upcoming data center capacity in Colombia is forecasted to surpass 230 MW upon completion, which is about four times the existing installed capacity. Approximately 35 MW of fresh power capacity is set to become operational by the conclusion of 2026. Key industry players such as ODATA and Eq are heavily involved in this sector.

data.title: Principled Transformation named 2025's Top Organizational Culture Service Provider by Manage HR Magazine. #HuntervilleNC #HRMagazine
data.description: Principled Transformation, a prominent company specializing in organizational culture consulting services and solutions, has recently been awarded the title of Top Organizational Culture Service Provider of 2025 by Manage HR magazine. The announcement was made in Huntersville, North Carolina on October 16, 2025. This recognition solidifies Principled Transformation's position as a leader in the industry and highlights their dedication to excellence.

data.title: Equity Union Real Estate sees 189% growth, $3.11B in sales volume, 3,639 sides by 2024, now 950 agents in 12 SoCal offices.
data.description: A Southern California-based independent brokerage, Equity Union Real Estate, has expanded to 950 agents operating in 12 offices across the region. This growth, achieved solely through internal means without any mergers or acquisitions, demonstrates the company's steady progress. As of October 16, 2025, their success is further highlighted by a notable 189% increase in transactions over the past five years.
IMF'S GEORGIEVA SAYS SEEING REGIONAL TRADE INTEGRATION GROWING

data.title: CVR Energy set to announce Q3 2025 earnings soon. Stay tuned for updates on performance numbers.
data.description: A report released today reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.3%, the highest in the last decade. Over 1.2 million people are currently without jobs, marking a significant increase from the previous year. Additionally, the report highlights a decrease in job creation, with only 250,000 new jobs added in the past month. Experts attribute this concerning trend to the ongoing economic challenges facing the nation. The government is urged to take immediate action to address the growing unemployment crisis and support those affected by job loss.
IMF's Georgieva Encourages India to Pursue Greater Trade Integration With Partners.
IMF's Georgieva Urges Nations To Follow Most-Favored Nation Trade Rules, Notes Increase In Regional Trade Integration

data.title: SEOULTECH researchers introduce VFF-Net, a forward-forward network replacing backpropagation, revolutionizing AI training.
data.description: A new algorithm utilizing the forward-forward network concept has been introduced for Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), aiming to overcome the limitations of traditional back-propagation. This innovation comes from Seoul, South Korea, as of October 16, 2025. Deep neural networks (DNNs), the driving force behind contemporary artificial intelligence (AI) models, are a crucial aspect to consider.

data.title: StellarAlgo introduces Fast Pass option to fast-track fan data utilization for leagues and teams, enhancing fan engagement.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on October 16, 2025, StellarAlgo, a top Sports Customer Data Platform provider used by major leagues and teams globally, introduced a new Fast Pass feature. This option allows customers to quickly access data within warehouses to enhance fan engagement. The Fast Pass offers increased flexibility and efficiency for users to harness data effectively.
Business leaders submit climate action report to Brazil for COP30, urging action on global warming.

data.title: IANS Research and Artico Search release a snapshot report on Fortune 500 security organizational design trends in 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, a report by IANS Research and Artico Search was published, providing a preview of findings from the 2025 Security Organizational Design Benchmark Report. This snapshot offers Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) insights into the organizational structures of Fortune 500 companies.

data.title: PAJUNK® increases U.S. headquarters in Alpharetta, Georgia with 30,000 sq ft growth for warehouse, cleanroom production, and offices.
data.description: A facility expansion in ALPHARETTA, Ga., on Oct. 16, 2025, has seen PAJUNK add 30,000 square feet to enhance warehouse, cleanroom production, and office capabilities. As a prominent global producer of medical devices for regional anesthesia and pain management, this development marks a significant step forward for the company.

data.title: BridGene Biosciences secures $28M in Series B+ funding to advance BGC-515 with support from Bayland Capital, GTJA Investment Group, Proxima Ventures, Lapam Capital, and Grains Valley Venture Capital.
data.description: A leader in the discovery and development of small molecule drugs, BridGene Biosciences, Inc., based in SAN JOSE, California, secured funding in a round led by Bayland Capital. Other participants included GTJA Investment Group, Proxima Ventures, Lapam Capital, and Grains Valley Venture Capital. This funding announcement was made on October 16, 2025, showcasing investor confidence in the company's work.

data.title: NBCC supports Dream Exchange to open public markets for small businesses; urges action on Main Street Growth Act.
data.description: The National Black Chamber of Commerce (NBCC) is calling for action on the Main Street Growth Act to establish venture exchanges for emerging and underrepresented companies. The organization reiterated its backing of Dream Exchange. This initiative aims to provide support to marginalized businesses for growth and recognition in the market. The NBCC's advocacy highlights the importance of promoting diversity and inclusivity in the business sector.

data.title: Empery Digital transfers Volcon brand to Venom-EV for 10% equity stake, retains intellectual property and distribution networks.
data.description: Austin-based Empery Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: EMPD) has recently disclosed a deal with Venom EV, LLC to sell the Volcon brand. Under the agreement, Empery Digital will receive a non-dilutable 10% equity stake in Venom's restructured Delaware corporation on a fully-diluted basis. As part of the deal, Empery Digital handed over all Volcon intellectual property, brand assets, trademarks, sales and distribution networks, and engineering documentation to Venom. This move signifies Empery Digital's strategic shift in its business operations.

data.title: Culture Discovery Vacations won Magellan Gold for customer service after achieving 300%+ growth with zero refunds during COVID-19.
data.description: In March 2020, when COVID-19 halted travel globally, most competitors sought legal assistance to handle cancellations. In contrast, Culture Discovery Vacations opted for livestreaming business meetings. Fast forward five years, the company stands out with no refund requests, experiencing remarkable growth exceeding 300%. This success has earned them the industry's prestigious top honor. The company is based in TAMPA, Fla., as of October 16, 2025.

data.title: CFP Board's guide highlights expertise gap in divorce financial analysis training for CFP® professionals. IDFA is the sole organization recognized to train them.
data.description: The Institute for Divorce Financial Analysts (IDFA) is the sole organization authorized to provide training in Divorce Financial Analysis for CFP® and other financial professionals. This announcement was made in Durham, North Carolina on October 16, 2025. The CFP Board has recently published a guide on Handling Conflicts of Interest in Marital Engagements, emphasizing the importance of this topic for financial services professionals.

data.title: Saltbox appoints Katerina Cirilli as Co-CEO, to lead national expansion, effective July 1, 2025.
data.description: In Atlanta on October 16, 2025, Saltbox, a logistics platform supporting small and growing businesses, revealed changes in its leadership. Starting July 1, 2025, President Katerina Cirilli was named Co-CEO alongside the Founder. This move marks a shift in the company's management.

data.title: DTECH® presents 2026 conference with 800+ speakers, 275+ sessions, Feb 2-5 in San Diego.
data.description: A major T&D industry event in San Diego, the DTECH® conference, set to be held from February 2 to 5, 2026, has unveiled its technical conference program. This annual event, previously known as DISTRIBUTECH, is a key gathering in the T&D sector. Scheduled in San Diego, CA, USA, the conference promises a robust program for participants.
